name: Colleague-provided eye-in-hand camera extrinsic
source: Imported on 2026-06-12 and numerically reconfirmed by the project owner on 2026-07-19
interpretation: Original variable was named T_CAMERA_FLANGE, with comment saying it maps points from camera frame to flange/base chain usage. In this project it is used as T_link6_camera: camera-frame coordinates expressed in link6/flange coordinates.
validation_required: Confirm that the physical camera stream is 640x480.
Collect additional validation frames at different robot poses.
Compare simulated trocar projection with real camera image at the same joint pose.
Use true trocar measurements and real trocar images for final pose/control experiments.

validation_evidence.interpretation: Normal convention is physically plausible: camera is below/near flange and chessboard is about 45 mm in front of the camera along the optical axis.
